title: Business Analytics Consultant
bullets: Designing a decision-support simulation tool to evaluate production volume strategies and forecast inventory obsolescence risk.
Modeling multi-year business outcomes using historical data and scenario analysis in Python/R and Excel.
Enabling data-driven production planning by translating simulation outputs into actionable insights for business stakeholders.
Collaborating with business stakeholders in an agile consulting environment, delivering executive-ready insights.

title: Team Lead, CNH Industrial Project
bullets: Leading a client-sponsored analytics consulting project using ML-based image analysis to assess facility conditions and compliance.
Translating business requirements into scalable computer vision analytics solutions, reducing reliance on manual inspections.
Defining data standards, quality checks, and evaluation metrics to ensure reliable, reproducible investment insights.
Coordinating a cross-functional team and aligning deliverables with client business objectives and timelines.
Driving project scoping and stakeholder alignment to ensure AI-enabled analytics deliver measurable business value.

title: Analyst
bullets: Built scalable data models and analytics solutions for energy-sector clients, enabling reporting, forecasting, and strategic decision-making across large operational datasets.
Designed and optimized high-performance SQL pipelines and transformations using SQL and Python, improving reporting efficiency by 95% and accelerating access to trusted insights.
Conducted exploratory analysis, trend analysis, KPI monitoring, and root-cause investigations to identify performance drivers, risks, and optimization opportunities.
Developed executive-ready dashboards and reporting in Power BI and Excel, translating complex findings into clear, actionable recommendations for business and product teams.
Partnered with stakeholders to gather, document, and validate business requirements, turning ambiguous needs into well-defined analytical outputs and measurable deliverables.
Drove analytics standardization and process improvement efforts to improve data quality, consistency, and reproducibility across teams and reporting layers.
Collaborated in cross-functional agile teams with consultants, product managers, and engineers to deliver end-to-end analytics solutions aligned with client objectives.
Completed Deloitte's AI/ML Analyst Program, applying experimentation and Python-based modeling techniques to real-world analytics and automation use cases.

title: Data Science Intern
bullets: Designed machine learning models for automated scoring systems, achieving 83% accuracy through feature engineering & tuning.
Compared NLP approaches & recommended optimal solutions based on performance, scalability & business needs.

title: Data Science Intern
bullets: Researched and implemented computer vision techniques, recommending the LBPH model to improve recognition accuracy by 87%.
Built Python-based proof-of-concepts integrating OpenCV with real-time data streams to demonstrate technical feasibility.
